records.question: Which drivers are assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(school_bus.if_full_time) = 'full-time' limit 5;
records.thought: To find drivers assigned to school buses that are exactly full-time, we join driver and school_bus on Driver_ID and filter where If_full_time is exactly full-time.

records.question: Which drivers named Douglas McCrory, who are at least 36 years old, live in Hartford, belong to the Dem party, and drive full-time school buses with exactly 8 years of experience?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.years_working = 8 AND driver.age >= 36 AND driver.name = 'Douglas McCrory' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.name) like '%douglas mccrory%' and driver.age >= 36 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%dem%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 and school_bus.years_working = 8 limit 5
records.thought: Filter drivers by name, age, city, and party, then join with school_bus to check full-time status and years working.

records.question: Which drivers who live in East Hartford, are Democrats, and drive full-time school buses work with schools?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.home_city = 'East Hartford' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND driver.party = 'Dem'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where lower(driver.home_city) like '%east hartford%' and lower(driver.party) like '%democrat%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 'yes' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter drivers by home city 'East Hartford' and party 'Democrat', join with school_bus to ensure they drive full-time school buses, and select their driver IDs.

records.question: Which drivers named Minnie Gonzalez, aged at least 46 and living in Hartford, work full-time driving school buses for no more than 3 years at private schools with grades 5th-12th grade?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
JOIN school ON school_bus.school_id = school.school_id
WHERE driver.name = 'Minnie Gonzalez' AND driver.age >= 46 AND driver.home_city = 'Hartford' AND school_bus.years_working <= 3 AND school.grade = '5th-12th grade' AND school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school.type = 'Private'
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id join school on school_bus.school_id = school.school_id where lower(driver.name) like '%minnie gonzalez%' and driver.age >= 46 and lower(driver.home_city) like '%hartford%' and school_bus.if_full_time = 1 and school_bus.years_working <= 3 and lower(school.type) like '%private%' and school.grade in ('5th', '6th', '7th', '8th', '9th', '10th', '11th', '12th') limit 5
records.thought: Filter drivers by name, age, and home city, join with school_bus to check full-time status and years working, and join with school to filter by private type and grade between 5th and 12th.

records.question: Which drivers are Democrats living in Hartford?

records.question: Which drivers aged at least 46 have been working exactly 3 years as full-time school bus drivers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT driver.driver_id FROM driver
JOIN school_bus ON driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id
WHERE school_bus.if_full_time = 'T' AND school_bus.years_working = 3 AND driver.age >= 46
records.pred_sql: select driver.driver_id from driver join school_bus on driver.driver_id = school_bus.driver_id where driver.age >= 46 and school_bus.years_working = 3 and school_bus.if_full_time = 'yes' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter drivers aged 46 or older who have exactly 3 years working as full-time school bus drivers by joining driver and school_bus tables and applying the conditions.
